title: Horizontal Alignment
text: Horizontal Alignment Horizontal alignment of the label— Left , Right , or Center . Value Representation Description (Default) If not specified, the label is left-aligned L Left Label is left-aligned C Center Label is centered; appropriate for tabular layouts R Right Label is right-aligned Description This property can be set only via the pop-up menu on a label. Applies To Label Related Links Labels in Forms and Reports Labels are objects that contain static. Most labels are associated with a field, but unassociated labels can be used for any static text on the component. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
